subgoals.description:
Call all four tools in sequence, then complete the task.
Step 1: venue_search(near='Haymarket', party_size=6, budget_max_gbp=800)
Step 2: get_weather(city='edinburgh', date='2026-04-25')
Step 3: calculate_cost(venue_id='haymarket_tap', party_size=6, duration_hours=3, catering_tier='bar_snacks')
Step 4: generate_flyer(event_details={venue_name, venue_address, date='2026-04-25', time='19:30', party_size=6, condition, temperature_c, total_gbp, deposit_required_gbp}) — populate from steps 1-3
Step 5: complete_task(result={'flyer': 'workspace/flyer.html'})
